source: /Users/jerod/refs/nd/opin/pdfs/2024/2024ND4.pdf lines 198-200: 'IV' appears on line 198, then blank, then '[¶13]' on line 200
evidence: In the PDF (authoritative source), the Roman numeral section heading 'IV' appears BEFORE paragraph [¶13]. The DB has reversed this order: [¶13] appears first, followed by 'IV'. This violates the document structure since section headings should precede the paragraphs they introduce. The opinion has four sections (I, II, III, IV); section IV contains [¶13] and [¶14], so IV must come before [¶13].
note: The section heading introduces the concluding remarks. The missequence in the DB breaks the logical document hierarchy. After the fix, section IV properly introduces [¶13] 'We reverse and remand...' followed by [¶14] signature block.
